meta.name: Saikat Bandyopadhyay
meta.title: Computational Biologist & Health AI Engineer
meta.tagline: Decoding the language of life to end human suffering

about.bio: I believe every genome holds a story of suffering that computation can help rewrite. From detecting brain hemorrhages with deep learning to tracing the causal architecture of disease through multi-omics, my work lives at the frontier where algorithms meet human healing. I build scalable, reproducible pipelines that transform raw biological signal into actionable clinical insight — because the distance between a sequencer's output and a patient's cure should be measured in code, not years.

highlights.label: Mission
highlights.value: Translating multi-omics data into cures through computational biology & AI

highlights.label: Stack
highlights.value: Python, R, PyTorch, Nextflow, GSAP, Three.js

highlights.label: Education
highlights.value: MS Biological Sciences, University of Virginia (2026)

projects.title: RAPID-CT: AI-Powered Brain Hemorrhage Detection
projects.description: Deep learning framework detecting Intracranial Hemorrhage from brain CT scans using segmentation-based ResNet architecture. Engineered a PII-blind REST API with split-key encryption for clinical deployment — because no patient should wait for a diagnosis while their data waits for permission.
projects.outcome: High-precision ICH classification with privacy-preserving clinical deployment

projects.title: Causal Gene Discovery Pipeline
projects.description: Computational colocalization pipeline integrating GWAS and bulk RNA-seq eQTL data to identify candidate causal genes in Diversity Outbred mice. Implemented conditional analysis with bootstrapping to validate concordance between conditional and colocalization signals.
projects.outcome: Identified novel causal gene candidates at significantly associated loci

projects.title: Proteogenomics: Beyond the Reference Genome
projects.description: Nextflow-based pipeline integrating long-read RNA sequencing with mass spectrometry to discover novel transcript isoforms and protein products absent from GENCODE annotations. Rewriting what we thought we knew about the proteome.
projects.outcome: Identified novel protein isoforms absent from GENCODE reference

projects.title: Single-Cell Trajectory Analysis of Bone Marrow
projects.description: Pseudotime trajectory analysis on single-cell RNA-seq data characterizing gene expression dynamics along osteoblast and osteoclast differentiation in bone marrow stromal cells — mapping the molecular choreography of bone formation.
projects.outcome: Mapped differentiation trajectories and prioritized causal genes via network hub overlap

projects.title: Low-Pass WGS Processing Pipeline
projects.description: High-throughput processing pipeline for Low-Pass Whole Genome Sequencing achieving 15% reduction in genotyping costs while maintaining fidelity for downstream haplotype calling and eQTL analysis.
projects.outcome: 15% reduction in genotyping costs with preserved data fidelity

projects.title: FAIR Data Governance Framework
projects.description: Architected a standardized data governance framework enforcing FAIR principles across all research data assets — transforming chaos into a reproducible, audit-ready ecosystem.
projects.outcome: Transformed unstructured research environment into reproducible ecosystem
